task_completion.description: Verify the recipient and subject are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' field contains 'opposing.counsel@lawfirm.com' and the 'Subject' field contains 'URGENT: Settlement Agreement'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Reply-To address is set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Reply-To' field is visible in the email header area and contains 'paralegal@mylawfirm.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify a brief body message is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text area of the email composition window contains some typed text.

task_completion.description: Verify the settlement agreement PDF is attached.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'settlement_agreement.pdf' is visible in the attachments pane of the email composition window.

task_completion.description: Verify the email priority is set to Highest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Options' menu shows 'Priority' set to 'Highest', or there is a visual indicator like an exclamation mark (!) or 'Highest' tag in the composition window.

task_completion.description: Verify a return receipt is requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Options' menu shows 'Return Receipt' checked, or a specific UI indicator/button for return receipt is active.

task_completion.description: Verify the email is actually sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Send' button is clicked, the composition window closes, or the email appears in the 'Sent' folder of the email client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI email application (like Thunderbird) is used to compose and send the email, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the attachment was added via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachment pane shows the file properly loaded, or a GUI file picker dialog was used to select the file from /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing commands like 'mail', 'sendmail', 'curl', or Python scripts used to send the email directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Recipient: opposing.counsel@lawfirm.com. Reply-To: paralegal@mylawfirm.com. Subject: 'URGENT: Settlement Agreement'. Attachment: 'settlement_agreement.pdf'. Priority: Highest (X-Priority: 1). Return receipt must be requested. A brief body message must be included.
